title: Evaluate Cluster Module vs. Workers
description: Compare the Node.js Cluster Module and Worker Threads for achieving concurrency and parallelism. Determine the appropriate use cases for OS-level process forking versus V8-level threading. Evaluate architectural decisions based on isolation, memory requirements, and fault tolerance.
objectives: Compare the Node.js Cluster Module and Worker Threads for achieving concurrency and parallelism.
Determine the appropriate use cases for OS-level process forking versus V8-level threading.
Evaluate architectural decisions based on isolation, memory requirements, and fault tolerance.
